446.caption: Logstash Pipeline
446.description: Pipeline name to check (see names under 'pipelines.yml'

2391.caption: Logstash CPU Critical
2391.description: The percentage of CPU usage on which to be a critical result (default "100")

2392.caption: Logstash CPU Warning
2392.description: The percentage of CPU usage on which to be a warning result (default "100")

2393.caption: Logstash File Descriptor Critical
2393.description: The percentage relative to the process file descriptor limit on which to be a critical result (default "100")

2394.caption: Logstash File Descriptor Warning
2394.description: The percentage relative to the process file descriptor limit on which to be a warning result (default "100")

2395.caption: Logstash Heap Usage Critical
2395.description: The percentage relative to the heap size limit on which to be a critical result (default "80")

2396.caption: Logstash Heap Usage Warning
2396.description: The percentage relative to the heap size limit on which to be a warning result (default "70")

521.caption: Filebeat Hostname
521.description: Hostaname or IP Address (default is localhost)

1669.caption: [NX] Tornado Webhook Secret
1669.description: Webhook endpoint token secret in Tornado

10632.caption: [NX] Elastic Critical
10632.description:
Critical threshold 
Threshold format for 'disk', 'mem', 'cpu' and 'maxshards': int (for percent), defaults to 80 (warn) and 95 (crit)
Threshold format for 'tps': int,int,int (active, queued, rejected), no defaults
Threshold format for all other check types': int, no defaults

10633.caption: [NX] Elastic Warning
10633.description:
Warning threshold
Threshold format for 'disk', 'mem', 'cpu' and 'maxshards': int (for percent), defaults to 80 (warn) and 95 (crit)
Threshold format for 'tps': int,int,int (active, queued, rejected), no defaults
Threshold format for all other check types': int, no defaults

10631.caption: Kibana API Auth File
10631.description: API Key file for Authentication (absolute path)

10630.caption: Kibana Critical
10630.description:
Critical threshold 
Threshold format for max_response_time': int, milliseconds

10629.caption: Kibana Warning
10629.description:
Warning threshold
Threshold format for max_response_time': int, milliseconds

10641.caption: [NX] Elastic Agent Type
10641.description: Agent type. Choose between the following values: 'winlogbeat', 'filebeat', 'auditbeat', 'packetbeat', 'metricbeat', 'elastic_agent', 'all'

10644.caption: [NX] Elastic Filters
10644.description: Filters to be added on query match, this param can be use multiple times (format: field.name=value)

10643.caption: [NX] NetEye Tenant
10643.description: Tenant name where search data (like namespace for ElasticAgent)

10646.caption: [NX] Elastic Check Interval
10646.description: Check interval range time with format 1m, 1d, 1h (default 5m)

10647.caption: [NX] Elastic Dataset Exclusion
10647.description: Dataset name to be excluded from check, this param can be use multiple times

10649.caption: [NX] Elastic Blockchain Name
10649.description: Blockchain to search iterations into the format <tenant>-<retention>-<tag>

10650.caption: [NX] Elastic Data Folder Path
10650.description: Path of the Elasticsearch Data Folder (usually /neteye/local/elasticsearch/data)

10651.caption: [NX] Elastic Disk Watermark Warning Multiplier
10651.description: Multiplier used for warning threshold for Elastic disk flooding watermark (default: 2.0)

10652.caption: [NX] Elastic Disk Watermark Critical Multiplier
10652.description: Multiplier used for critical threshold for Elastic disk flooding watermark (default: 1.5)
